tech_news.title: Hold off on playing Scott Pilgrim EX on Xbox: All 30 achievements are completely broken - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: If you were thinking of playing Scott Pilgrim EX, you will want to wait for a fix, as every single achievement in the beat em' up is busted.

tech_news.title: Mar10 Day deals: Save up to 90% on Nintendo Switch games - Mashable
tech_news.description: Or you could just show up to GameStop dressed as Mario and get $5 in store credit.

tech_news.title: Crimson Desert finally unveils PS5 and Xbox console specs and multiple performance modes ahead of its arrival next week - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss has revealed the game's console specs and performance modes alongside the ROG Xbox Ally and Mac details.

tech_news.title: Apple’s new MacBooks have keyboard change you might notice instantly - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Apple’s newest MacBooks all change the keyboard to remove several former text labels in favor of glyphs. Here are the details.

tech_news.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Frame Generation is rolling out at the end of March - The Verge
tech_news.description: Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Multi Frame Generation and Dynamic Frame Generation will be available starting March 31st for users with RTX 50-series GPUs.

tech_news.title: A 24-year-old who ditched her smartphone and social media wants you to be 'appstinent' too - CNBC
tech_news.description: Appstinence founder Gabriela Nguyen deleted her social media accounts and downgraded to a dumbphone after finding the tech had become her "center of gravity."

tech_news.title: Hours After Announcing Donald Glover as Yoshi in the Super Mario Galaxy Movie, Nintendo Has Now Revealed Its New Yoshi Game Release Date - IGN
tech_news.description: It's been a busy 24 hours for Yoshi fans. Following confirmation that Donald Glover will voice the elastic-tongued dinosaur in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, we now know the release date for Yoshi's next game.

tech_news.title: I reviewed the MacBook Neo, ask me anything - The Verge
tech_news.description: I’ll be here to answer subscriber questions about Apple’s new $599 laptop today at 11AM PT / 2PM ET.
